allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('54.'\)]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v\) for k,v in d.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in ['splash','router','font','status','linking','notification','secure','device','reanimated','gesture','screens','safe-area']\)]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('0.'\) or x.startswith\('1.'\) or x.startswith\('54.'\) or x.startswith\('14.'\) or x.startswith\('15.'\) or x.startswith\('53.'\) or x.startswith\('54.'\) or \(not x.startswith\('55.'\)\)][-20:]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('0.29'\) or x.startswith\('0.30'\) or x.startswith\('0.28'\)]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([x for x in v if x.startswith\('4.'\) or x.startswith\('5.'\)][:30]\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[x for x in v if not 'canary' in x and not 'preview' in x and not 'alpha' in x]; print\(stable[-10:]\)")
